title: canary-skill-registration
description: Result of querying the runtime's in-memory skill registry for a skill named 'canary'. This schema deliberately avoids fields that are commonly paraphrased by the model, and avoids fields that require reading SKILL.md.

registered.description: True iff a skill with the exact name 'canary' is registered in the runtime's skill list.

name.description: The registered skill name verbatim, or null when not registered.

status.description: found when registered is true, otherwise missing.
